NAME

SYNOPSIS

DESCRIPTION

The function returns 1 if the number is otherwise 0. The function returns 1 if the number is otherwise 0.

SEE ALSO

BUGS

Neither the nor the Tahoe floating point have distinguished values for either infinity or not-a-number. These routines always return 0 on those architectures.
